etimesBest Picture to Best Actor at the Oscars 2026: Internet can’t believe Grok AI predicted winners so accuratelyThe 98th Academy Awards saw Conan O'Brien host a night of cinematic celebration. Notably, Grok AI accurately predicted multiple Oscar winners, including Best Picture for 'One Battle After Another' and Best Actor for Michael B. Jordan. Jessie Buckley also secured her predicted Best Actress win, further validating Grok's impressive foresight.

etimesWhat is the ‘Rocket Stove’ by a Bengaluru uncle that’s going viral during LPG crisisAmidst an LPG supply crisis, a Bengaluru man's fuel-saving rocket stove, initially designed for rural homes, is gaining traction. Developed by former ONGC engineer Ashok Urs, the compact stove efficiently burns biomass with minimal smoke, offering a potential solution for restaurants facing fuel shortages.

etimesEid-ul-fitr 2026: Easy Gemini AI photo editing prompts for picture-perfect Eid posts on InstagramAs Eid ul-Fitr approaches, a new AI trend is transforming festive photos into stunning portraits. Families can now digitally craft professional-looking images, resembling magazine shoots or regal palace scenes. These AI prompts offer creative ways to enhance Eid celebrations, ensuring cherished memories are captured with a touch of modern glamour for 2026.
